name: au-super-guarantee
description: > Use this skill whenever asked about Australian Superannuation Guarantee (SG) obligations, voluntary super contributions, concessional and non-concessional caps, Division 293 tax, government co-contribution, spouse contribution tax offset, carry-forward rules, or any question about super for sole traders or employers. Trigger on phrases like \"how much super do I pay\", \"SG rate\", \"super guarantee\", \"concessional cap\", \"Division 293\", \"salary sacrifice super\", \"personal super contrib
author: openaccountants
